notes: AI-generated sheets were converted into transparent, gridless, uniformly-sized Phaser atlases.
This is the highest automated refinement pass possible from the available generated sheets; no external human artist was used.
For commercial polish, edge masks and inconsistent anatomy should still be visually reviewed, but all requested IDs are mapped or marked as virtual/parameter/template.
